plaintext_response: WHAT: The user is asking 'why can't they hear me?' in Hindi. WHY: This indicates their microphone is likely muted during the video call, so they need to turn on the microphone. ACTION: Highlighting element E33.
selected_semantic: Turn on microphone toggle with settings arrow in the bottom center Google Meet control bar.
direction_for_user: apna maikrofon on karne ke liye is button par click karein.
